chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Misc. Applications No.500, 519 and 520 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority case 1. For orders on office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.8634 of 2023 16.10.2025 M/s. Muhammad Asad Ashfaq Tola and Rehan Kayani, Advocates for Applicant Mr. R.D. Kalhoro, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant, under instructions, does not press these Criminal Misc. Applications, which are dismissed as not pressed along with pending application[s], if any. Office to place a copy of this Order in connected matters. JUDGE Qurban
